item.title: Good morning!
item.dc:creator: WazertFromBlueSky

item.title: Elon Musk Biographer Details Why He Thinks Billionaire Is ‘Going Mad’
item.description: The Harvard Law-educated biographer Seth Abramson speculated Monday that Musk might be “going mad” in a setting for all to see—brought on by his growing stress, history of mental illness, and self-described heavy drug use. “I legitimately believe Elon Musk may be going mad,” he posted to X. “I’m a Musk biographer who has been tracking his online behavior for the last two years—and given that he’s admitted to all of mental illness, heavy drug use, and crippling stress, it is now reasonable to fear he is deeply unwell.” https://www.thedailybeast.com/elon-musk-biographer-seth-abramson-details-why-he-thinks-billionaire-is-going-mad/
item.dc:creator: charondaboatman

item.title: Super high five mode activated!
item.dc:creator: Headcase444

item.title: 50 Imgur Pictures I downloaded In 2014 Or Before
item.description:
I found an old thumb drive.
I thought we'd take a moment to remember a different Imgur.
I thought we'd take a trip to a simpler time.
This is made of wood.
Self-portrait of an Imgurian on lsd.
Banana for scale. Naturally.
"The True Doctor" Time marches on.
Made by another creative Imgurian. What do you want to eat tonight?
I chose how to end this dump deliberately.
Hard times are coming fast.
We are going to struggle.
But we will have each other.
item.dc:creator: catsnroombas

item.title: Pallas Athena art
item.description:
A Hellenic goddess of wisdom, warfare, and artisanship; by YamaOrce
2 by Fernanda Suarez
3 by YamaOrce. Top: the sisters Demeter, Hera and Hestia Middle: the sisters Artemis and Athena. Bottom: Aphrodite
4 by Un Lee
5 by Stefan Kopinski
6 by sheppardarts
7 by YamaOrce
8 by Andrew Mar
9 by Storm Neverland
Wonder Woman tax by Terry and Rachel Dodson
item.dc:creator: Ngugi

item.title: Big Jack
item.description: Think the style looks familiar? Well done, you're right: this is the same guy as does Pixie and Brutus. Not so light and fluffy now, huh? Original here: https://www.webtoons.com/en/canvas/pet-foolery/big-jack/viewer?title_no=691801&episode_no=94
item.dc:creator: TheDildoOfConsequences

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1237 (empanada finch)
item.description:
Let's get this bread.
Still working on the historical commentary for the history chad meme dump, but I promise it will come.
The next time one of those hobby posts comes around, would you all like me to go through the production of a mead? If so, which upcoming mead, Pando-monium or Sky-Disc? I'd go through ingredients, research, Vines, mixing, fermenting, down to bottling and labeling.
They're a bit reticent on the topic.
Yay capitalism.
Wololo
This Curve-billed Thrasher is attacking a tarantula.
Someone write this, stat.
AND THE WINGED HUSSARS ARRIVED, CHARGING DOWN THE MOUNTAINSIDE
Give the bird an empanada.
A friend got me a plush serotonin molecule for Christmas. I felt seen.
I once wrote a poem about this. I am fairly sure I shared it with @kaeldra, but if you want I can share that too.
It oddly works.
Things did not go well for the Palaiologoi dynasty of Rome.
I'd prefer unlimited steaks, but I'd settle for this holosuite fantasy, too.
Well fuck. That's... let's see. 1237 posts, about 48 memes each.... thats.... approximately 59,376 memes.
This is the kind of love I seek.
Do not obey in advance. Do not obey, ever. He does not have the Mandate of Heaven. No kings, no crowns, no oligarchs.
This looks so cozy. Also makes me think about the song currently stuck in my head: https://youtu.be/-6BJEasgFKU?si=_7qW9KCuRwAQ4CJK
Pippin tax Today's message from Pippin: "ohmygawd"
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: Steal these (or don't)
item.description:
They are VERY pretty tho... I want to hold them in my hands.
ヽ(。_°)ノ
♫♪ Song reference ♫♪
Very Fashion. Much wow.
THE GAY AGENDA?!
I have a sewing machine, and I KNOW it smells my fear.
"corpse:water ratio tolerance" HA!
Clicky-clacky noises, smooth cool feel, ...delicious appearance.
This one always makes me laugh...
...And THIS one always makes me laugh, too!
Notes: breathing hole/eating hole so close together also seems like a bad design decision.
SOON: "I'm Batman"
♫♪ Song reference ♫♪
Let's normalize bros being able to ask bros for a nice pic that doesn't necessarily need to involve "I accomplished a kill", okay
ʰᵉ ᶠⁱᵉʳᶜᵉ
Let's have this kid make some sick-burn equivalent of a thesaurus
Maybe you just need someone to actively listen, even
Beuller? Beuller?
ˢʰᵉ ⁱˢ ᵇᵉᵃᵘᵗʸ ˢʰᵉ ⁱˢ ᵍʳᵃᶜᵉ
Excellent news! We're now in 2025, so things will be much different! (-_-)
(◠◡◠)
ART.
(◠◡◠)
I hope both Erics stay in the same city for the rest of their lives ツ
( ♥‿♥)
(◠◡◠)
♫♪ Song reference ♫♪
Gold star for understanding!
♫♪ Song reference ♫♪
Laundry sauce in the clothing cleanser
Always appreciate the visualization of this one
Grammar does not matter when it's this sweet and lovely ♥
Give me all the "more buttons" please. I am apparently not a witch.
I guess we know what category "what are you doing, step bro" falls into
Intensely stupid to perceive people as "less-than" for the job that they do. (Exceptions to the rule, of course: Dictators, human traffickers, and so on)
I'm sorry, but it is the truth.
It's important to put things where they belong :)
◕_◕
I read it in his voice ツ
Unions are important, mmmkay?!
I would be SO mesmerized! Moving water! Beautiful pattern! EXTREMELY high water bill!
♥
This one always makes me smile!
VERY TEMPERATURE YES
Real. I wonder if this will EVER no longer need to be taught to us.
[If you haven't seen the Cloudy With a Chance of Meatballs movies, DO! They are just so very CUTE and neat!]
One is when you're revelling in your comfy and cozy zone, the other is when you're forced out of your comfy and cozy zone because Required to Do Life Things Against Your Will When You'd Rather Remain in Comfy and Cozy Zone.
I had one boss who was the most THIS I have ever experienced. I absolutely left that job; those kinds of people are impossible to work for, and very much suck. Deeply.
So! Who knows where mob bosses hang out these days...?
♫♪ Song reference ♫♪
Please have yourself a REALLY NICE DAY. ツ
item.dc:creator: FrostyLady

item.dc:creator: TheMajinVegeta

item.title: Could you survive 2 weeks on 2 granola bars?
item.description: Crazy story TL;DR: 23yo man gets lost after wandering away from his group to take photos, survives in dense forest after finding an abandoned hut and two muesli bars, and after 13 days of search, and it was a random different group of hikers who ran into him and got him help. SAUCE: https://www.9news.com.au/national/missing-hiker-hadi-nazari-found-alive-kosciuszko-national-park/7a36a170-4303-44ce-895e-6452c5d40797 https://edition.cnn.com/travel/australia-missing-hiker-found-intl-hnk/index.html
item.dc:creator: atomicassailant

item.title: Any love for 2007’s quiet classic Stardust?
item.description:
I feel this is an underrated movie. I’ve loved this movie for a long time. Also a huge Claire Danes fan! And Michelle Pfiefer = wowsers, hubba hubba! Here is an excellent review of the movie if you care to check it out: https://thenerdd.com/2019/11/22/have-you-seen-stardust/
Claire Danes is a star (like our sun, star) who wishes to know what loving a mortal would be like.
Of course she meets a handsome devil.
Then you know… love
There are some witches
This is Michelle Pfeifer
Hot momma!
I love this movie like De Niro loves cross dressing!
This villain is funny
Henry Cavill makes an appearance if you like that tall handsome type.
10/10 recommend this “sci fi”, fantasy, dramady or is it dramedy?
item.dc:creator: WhatTheFruckRrobsterKraws
